today.subtitle: Weekend morning cardio
today.adjustment_label: Sleep not synced — plan as written
today.why: Sleep data hasn't arrived yet. RHR (61 bpm) is near average and body battery peaked at 34 overnight — low, but yesterday's recovery was solid (HRV 16% above baseline, sleep score 81). Proceed with the plan; sync Garmin Connect if in doubt.

cut_note: *7d TDEE pulled down by today's partial read (345 cal). 6-day complete avg ~2,726 cal → ~1.59 lb/wk possible ceiling; truer gap ~647 cal/day over protocol.
